fixes.title: Outline dotted instead of dashed
fixes.description: Replaced all instances of focus-visible:outline-dashed with focus-visible:outline-dotted across HeaderMainItem.php, HeaderMainItem.tsx, HeaderMainSubItem.php, HeaderMainSubItem.tsx using replace_all.

fixes.title: Add focus-visible outline to all interactive elements in HeaderMain
fixes.description: Added focus-visible:outline-dotted focus-visible:outline-2 focus-visible:outline-white focus-visible:outline-offset-2 to: desktop search submit button, mobile search submit button (via replace_all on shared class), SEP mobile button, SEP desktop CTA link, mobile hamburger toggle button (also added text-white per CHG-004), logo link (both ImageDropUploader and anchor via replace_all), mobile CTA link. In both PHP and TSX.

fixes.title: Spacer hidden by default, toggled by JS
fixes.description: Added hidden class to the header-main-spacer div in HeaderMain.php and HeaderMain.tsx. In HeaderMain.js, introduced showSpacer(height) and hideSpacer() helpers that toggle hidden/block classes alongside setting the height. updateScrollStatus() calls showSpacer when transitioning into fixed mode and hideSpacer when returning to normal flow (with guard for mobile menu open + fixedScrollMobile). openMenu() also calls showSpacer when forcing fixed mode on mobile.

fixes.title: Mobile hamburger button text-white in TSX
fixes.description: Added text-white to the mobile toggle button className in HeaderMain.tsx (it was only on the SVG child elements). PHP already had text-white on the button. Both PHP and TSX now have text-white on the button element itself.

fixes.title: Keep header fixed when mobile menu is open
fixes.description: In openMenu(): when !isDesktop() && fixedScrollMobile, force header.classList.add('scrolling', 'scrolling-up'), remove 'scrolling-down', and call showSpacer(header.offsetHeight). In updateScrollStatus(): when menu-open class is present and !isDesktop(), skip adding scrolling-down class (the if-block for scrolling-down now wraps in: if (!menuIsOpen || isDesktop())). The hideSpacer() call in the else-branch is also guarded: not called if menuIsOpen && !isDesktop() && fixedScrollMobile.

fixes.title: Mobile menu max-height constrained to viewport
fixes.description: In HeaderMain.php: replaced menu-open:max-h-[2000px] with menu-open:max-h-[calc(100dvh-var(--fixed-offset,80px))] and added menu-open:overflow-y-auto. In HeaderMain.tsx: updated the isMenuOpen cn-branch from max-md:overflow-hidden + max-h via absence to explicit max-md:max-h-[calc(100dvh-var(--fixed-offset,80px))] max-md:opacity-100 max-md:pointer-events-auto max-md:overflow-y-auto.

fixes.title: Mobile nav padding always-on
fixes.description: In HeaderMain.php: moved pt-4 pb-8 from menu-open: conditional variants to always-on max-md: base classes (max-md:pt-4 max-md:pb-8) and removed menu-open:pt-4 menu-open:pb-8. In HeaderMain.tsx: moved max-md:pt-4 max-md:pb-8 from the isMenuOpen cn-branch to the always-true base string. The max-h-0 overflow-hidden keeps padding invisible when menu is closed.

validation.warningDetails: All warnings are in unrelated blocks (Accordion, Archive, ContentWithMedia, FullWidthMedia, PostHero, Tabs). The htmlStructureSync warning for HeaderMain is expected — TSX editor view intentionally differs from PHP frontend rendering.
